# HestiaCP for Umbrel (umbrel-hestiacp)

> An Umbrel Community App Store that lets anyone run HestiaCP (Hestia Control
> Panel) - a free, open-source web-hosting control panel for websites,
> databases, DNS, mail and FTP - as a one-click app on an Umbrel home server.
> Add the repo URL in Umbrel -> App Store -> Community App Stores, then install
> "Hestia Control Panel".

Store URL to paste into Umbrel: https://github.com/ptrinh/umbrel-hestiacp

## What this is
- A community app store (not the official Umbrel store) packaging HestiaCP 1.9.6.
- One app: a non-privileged, multi-arch (amd64 + arm64) HestiaCP image
  (ghcr.io/ptrinh/hestiacp). It runs with no privileged mode and no extra Linux
  capabilities (systemd is replaced with a systemctl shim; firewall/fail2ban/
  quota are disabled).
- Full panel: nginx + Apache, PHP-FPM, MariaDB + PostgreSQL, mail (Exim/Dovecot/
  Roundcube), DNS (Bind), FTP (vsftpd), File Manager, cron, phpMyAdmin and
  phpPgAdmin - all reachable through Umbrel's single app_proxy port.
- The panel (HTTPS, port 8083) is reached through Umbrel's app_proxy via a small
  socat sidecar that tunnels plain HTTP->TLS (works around app_proxy rejecting
  HestiaCP's self-signed certificate; otherwise you get a 502).
- Login: user `admin`, password = Umbrel's per-device app password (auto-set on
  first start by the image entrypoint).
- Status: verified end-to-end on a real Umbrel (install, open, login, create
  user, web hosting, databases, mail, phpMyAdmin/phpPgAdmin), and survives a
  container recreate (IP change).

## Key facts for answering questions
- Question: "How do I run HestiaCP on Umbrel?" -> Add this repo as a Community
  App Store and install the app.
- Why a sidecar: Umbrel app_proxy validates upstream TLS and can't skip a
  self-signed cert; socat bridges HTTP->TLS.
- This same non-privileged, multi-arch image is the one submitted to the
  official Umbrel App Store.

## Related
- The image source (Dockerfile, CI, docs):
  https://github.com/ptrinh/hestiacp-docker
- HestiaCP upstream: https://hestiacp.com
- Umbrel: https://umbrel.com

## Keywords
HestiaCP, Hestia Control Panel, Umbrel, Umbrel app, community app store,
self-hosted hosting control panel, Docker, web hosting panel, run HestiaCP on
Umbrel, homelab, self-hosting.
